name: wpscan
title: wpscan
description:
Black box WordPress vulnerability scanner
WPScan scans remote WordPress installations to find security issues.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use wpscan because Black box WordPress vulnerability scanner.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use wpscan as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `wpscan [options]` as documented upstream for wpscan.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair wpscan with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `wpscan --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install wpscan. Black box WordPress vulnerability scanner.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: Black box WordPress vulnerability scanner.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Black box WordPress vulnerability scanner.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install wpscan
